sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4498" key="a)llotrio/gnwmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλοτριό-γνωμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4498.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thinking of other things, absent</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">154</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
